forgotPassword.title: Recover password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll email you a link to create a new password.
forgotPassword.sentBody: If the details match an account, you'll receive an email with a reset link in the next few minutes. The link expires in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.email.label: Email
resetPassword.title: Create your new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Your new password replaces the old one and signs out any active sessions.
resetPassword.newPassword.label: New password
resetPassword.newPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Taking you to sign in…
resetPassword.error.expired.title: Link expired
resetPassword.error.expired.message: This link is no longer valid. Request a new one from the sign-in screen.
resetPassword.error.server.title: Can't reach the server
resetPassword.error.server.message: Check your connection and try again.
login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Admin Portal
login.tenantSlug.label: Company identifier
login.tenantSlug.help: The one you chose at signup. Leave blank if you're a user of the original system.
login.username.label: Username
login.password.label: Password
login.error.invalidCredentials.title: Invalid credentials
login.error.invalidCredentials.message: The username or password is incorrect. Please try again.
login.error.accessRestricted.title: Access restricted
login.error.accessRestricted.message: Your account is not allowed to access the system.
login.error.serverDown.title: Can't reach the server
login.error.serverDown.message: Please check your connection and try again.
login.error.sessionExpired.title: Session expired
login.error.sessionExpired.message: Please sign in again to continue.
signup.title: Create your company account
signup.subtitle: Start your 14-day free trial — no credit card required.
signup.companyName.label: Company name
signup.tenantSlug.label: Workspace identifier
signup.tenantSlug.help: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Will be part of your URL.
signup.tenantSlug.pattern: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Cannot start or end with a hyphen.
signup.adminFullName.label: Full name
signup.adminEmail.label: Email
signup.adminUsername.label: Username
signup.adminUsername.help: The name you'll use to sign in.
signup.adminUsername.pattern: Letters, numbers, dots, hyphens or underscores only.
signup.adminPassword.label: Password
signup.adminPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
signup.error.slugTaken.title: Identifier unavailable
signup.error.slugTaken.message: That identifier is already in use. Try another.
signup.error.slugReserved.title: Identifier reserved
signup.error.slugReserved.message: That identifier is reserved. Pick another.
signup.error.rateLimited.title: Too many attempts
signup.error.rateLimited.message: You've made too many signup attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
signup.error.validation.title: Invalid data
signup.error.validation.message: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
signup.error.server.title: Can't reach the server
signup.error.server.message: Please check your connection and try again.
acceptInvite.title: Create your account
acceptInvite.subtitle: You're invited to join {{tenant}} as {{role}}.
acceptInvite.fullName.label: Full name
acceptInvite.username.label: Username
acceptInvite.username.pattern: Letters, numbers, dots, hyphens or underscores only.
acceptInvite.password.label: Password
acceptInvite.password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
acceptInvite.expired.title: Invitation expired
acceptInvite.expired.message: This invitation link is no longer valid. Ask your admin for a new one.
acceptInvite.serverError.title: Can't reach the server
acceptInvite.serverError.message: Please check your connection and try again.
acceptInvite.error.usernameTaken.title: Username unavailable
acceptInvite.error.usernameTaken.message: That username is already taken in this workspace. Pick another.
acceptInvite.error.expired.title: Invitation expired
acceptInvite.error.expired.message: This link is no longer valid. Ask your admin for a new one.
acceptInvite.error.validation.title: Invalid data
acceptInvite.error.server.title: Can't reach the server
acceptInvite.error.server.message: Please check your connection and try again.
invite.modal.title: Invite a new user
invite.modal.subtitle: Select the role and share the QR (or link) with the person.
invite.modal.role.label: Role
invite.modal.subcontractor.note: Subcontractors are created manually — use the Create User form instead.
invite.modal.qrHint: The person scans the QR (or uses the link) to create their account.
invite.modal.error: Could not generate the invitation. Try again.
